name: O'Reilly Automotive
analysis: ORLY has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 17% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry $90.6800, stop $84.4965, target $100.6300 (1.61:1) — then trail it.
